data.title: Pathward Financial Posts Solid Q2 Results Amid Tax Strength
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Pathward Financial ( (CASH) ) has provided an announcement.

Pathward Financial, Inc., a U.S.-based financial holding company focused on tax services, partner solutions and commercial finance, reported fiscal second-quarter 2026 net income of $72.9 million, or $3.35 per share, for the three months ended March 31, 2026, slightly down from $75.0 million a year earlier. Management highlighted strong tax-season performance, robust partner pipeline and growing commercial finance net interest income, while Pathward, N.A. again earned Great Place To Work certification, underscoring its emphasis on culture.

For the 2026 fiscal second quarter, total revenue rose to $276.3 million, driven by a 9% increase in noninterest income, with notable gains in card and deposit fees, tax-related fee income and refund transfer product fees, which together made noninterest income 55% of revenue. New loan originations excluding tax services climbed to $1.31 billion, supported by a 2025 consumer finance contract, and the company posted a 3.56% annualized return on average assets and 54.41% return on average tangible equity.

During the six months ended March 31, 2026, tax-services product revenue increased 13% to $95.7 million, with higher refund advances and transfers and a $4.4 million reduction in credit-loss provisions, lifting net tax-services product income 30% to $62.0 million; refund advance originations reached $1.87 billion versus $1.66 billion in the 2025 season. These gains reflect efforts to grow tax products, capture market share and refine underwriting models and data analytics in this core business line.

Net interest income for the quarter fell 8% to $125.1 million, mainly due to lower income from the consumer finance portfolio and cash, following the October 2025 sale of a consumer portfolio that had carried higher reported yields, while commercial finance loans and leases generated an $8.4 million interest-income increase. Average interest-earning assets slipped to $7.65 billion as the balance sheet shifted away from cash and securities toward loans and leases, and net interest margin narrowed to 6.63%, or 5.32% on an adjusted basis excluding gross consumer finance yields, with funding costs remaining low.

Noninterest income rose 9% to $151.2 million, aided by stronger tax-related fees, card and deposit fees and refund transfer revenues, partially offset by weaker secondary market and rental income after a prior-year working-capital portfolio gain. Servicing fees on custodial deposits at partner banks increased both sequentially and year over year on higher average balances, underscoring the importance of Pathward’s partner-bank arrangements and deposit-driven revenue streams.

Noninterest expense declined 3% to $143.5 million, reflecting lower card processing and other costs, even as the company increased spending on compensation, benefits, buildings and software to support its long-term strategy. Card processing expense, which is tied to rate-indexed partner agreements and federal funds rate moves, remained significant but decreased year over year, and the company’s effective tax rate for the quarter was 16.2% on income tax expense of $14.2 million, reinforcing solid bottom-line profitability despite portfolio repositioning.

The most recent analyst rating on (CASH) stock is a Buy with a $107.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Pathward Financial stock, see the CASH Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on CASH Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, CASH is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by strong underlying fundamentals (high profitability and strong returns with currently low leverage) and positive technical momentum with the stock trading above key moving averages. A raised FY2026 EPS guide and improving operating metrics further support the outlook, while historical free-cash-flow inconsistency and execution/timing risks (partner ramp and tax season) temper the score.

To see Spark’s full report on CASH stock, click here.

More about Pathward Financial

Pathward Financial, Inc., listed on Nasdaq as CASH, is a U.S.-based financial holding company focused on powering financial inclusion through a mix of tax services, commercial and consumer finance, card and deposit solutions, and partner-driven banking platforms. Its subsidiary Pathward, N.A. operates as a nationally chartered bank, and the group emphasizes partner solutions, higher-returning assets, and workplace culture, having been Certified by Great Place To Work for four consecutive years.

Average Trading Volume: 267,805

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $2.17B

data.title: Waste Connections Delivers Strong Q1 2026 Results, Boosts Outlook
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Waste Connections ( (TSE:WCN) ) has provided an update.

Waste Connections reported better-than-expected first-quarter 2026 results on April 22, 2026, with revenue rising 6.4% year on year to $2.37 billion and adjusted EBITDA increasing 8% to $769.5 million, driving a 32.5% adjusted EBITDA margin despite weather-related headwinds and higher fuel costs. Net income declined to $219.3 million from $241.5 million due to higher impairments tied to landfill closure and post-closure costs, but adjusted net income per share improved to $1.23, while the company signaled continued acquisition momentum, operational benefits from AI-driven investments, and stepped-up capital returns after repurchasing about 1% of its shares year-to-date, underscoring confidence in its outlook amid geopolitical uncertainty.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:WCN) stock is a Hold with a C$185.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Waste Connections stock, see the TSE:WCN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on WCN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, WCN is a Neutral.

The score is driven mainly by solid underlying profitability and operating cash generation, plus constructive 2026 guidance for margins and free cash flow. These strengths are tempered by a weak technical setup (price below major moving averages), premium valuation (high P/E with low yield), and financial trajectory concerns from the 2025 revenue/FCF decline and rising leverage.

To see Spark’s full report on WCN stock, click here.

More about Waste Connections

Waste Connections, Inc. is an integrated solid waste services company providing non-hazardous waste collection, transfer and disposal, including by rail, as well as recycling and renewable fuels generation. It serves about nine million residential, commercial and industrial customers in mostly exclusive and secondary markets across 46 U.S. states and six Canadian provinces, and also offers non-hazardous oilfield waste and intermodal services.

data.title: Flag Ship Acquisition Faces Nasdaq Compliance Deficiency Notice
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Flag Ship Acquisition Corporation ( (FSHP) ) is now available.

Flag Ship Acquisition Corp., a Nasdaq-listed SPAC, disclosed that on April 17, 2026 it received a Nasdaq deficiency notice for failing to file its Form 10-K for the year ended Dec. 31, 2025 on time. The lapse puts the company out of compliance with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5250(c)(1) for continued listing.

The company has until June 16, 2026 to submit a compliance plan and could receive up to Oct. 12, 2026 to regain compliance if Nasdaq accepts it. The notice has no immediate effect on the listing of its securities, but there is no assurance the SPAC will ultimately satisfy Nasdaq’s requirements, creating uncertainty for investors as it works to complete the overdue filing.

More about Flag Ship Acquisition Corporation

Flag Ship Acquisition Corp. is a New York-based blank check company, or special purpose acquisition company (SPAC), formed to pursue a business combination with one or more businesses or entities. It does not limit its search to any particular industry or geography and is sponsored by Whale Management Corporation, with a definitive deal already signed with Great Future Technology Inc.

Average Trading Volume: 5,468

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $54.98M

Find detailed analytics on FSHP stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

Essential Properties Realty ( (EPRT) ) has shared an update.

On April 22, 2026, Essential Properties Realty Trust reported first-quarter 2026 results marked by robust acquisition and capital-raising activity, alongside double-digit growth in key cash flow metrics. The REIT invested $388.6 million across 126 properties at a 7.7% weighted average cash cap rate, realized $10.2 million of disposition proceeds from six assets, and lifted adjusted funds from operations per share by 11% to $0.50, even as net income per share slipped 3% to $0.28.

The company also strengthened its balance sheet and growth outlook, raising over $419 million in gross equity during the quarter and ending with pro forma net debt at 3.5 times annualized adjusted EBITDAre. Citing strong early-year momentum despite a dynamic macro backdrop, management increased 2026 AFFO guidance to $2.00–$2.05 per share and investment guidance to $1.1–$1.5 billion, signaling an accelerated expansion strategy for its net-lease portfolio and positive implications for shareholders seeking earnings growth and scaled deployment.

The most recent analyst rating on (EPRT) stock is a Buy with a $40.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Essential Properties Realty stock, see the EPRT Stock Forecast page.

Essential Properties Realty Trust, Inc. is a Princeton, N.J.-based net-lease real estate investment trust focused on owning and managing single-tenant, service-oriented and experience-based properties across the U.S. As of March 31, 2026, the company’s portfolio comprised 2,417 properties totaling 27.3 million square feet, with a weighted average lease term of 14.6 years and occupancy of 99.7%. Its tenant base is diversified, with the top 10 tenants accounting for 15.8% of cash annual base rent and a rent coverage ratio of 3.5x, and a substantial 65.3% of cash rent coming from properties under master leases.

data.title: XVIVO Reports Strong Early Trial Results for HOPE Technology in DCD Heart Transplants
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Xvivo Perfusion AB ( (SE:XVIVO) ) has shared an announcement.

XVIVO Perfusion AB reported encouraging interim results from the HOPE-at-Heart clinical trial, the first prospective multicenter study to test direct procurement of donor hearts after circulatory death followed by hypothermic oxygenated perfusion using the XVIVO Heart Assist Transport system. The single-arm proof-of-concept trial enrolled 40 adult recipients at four European centers and achieved 98% patient survival at 30 days, with low rates of severe primary graft dysfunction and post-operative mechanical circulatory support despite average preservation times exceeding 300 minutes.

Clinicians involved in the study highlighted the high utilization rate and strong early performance of DCD hearts preserved with HOPE, noting that the technique offers additional logistical flexibility that can help ensure more organs are used rather than discarded. XVIVO’s management said the findings add to a growing body of global clinical experience with HOPE in heart transplantation and support the company’s mission to help transplant programs expand access to donor organs, though the heart technology remains investigational and is not yet commercially available in the U.S.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:XVIVO) stock is a Buy with a SEK225.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Xvivo Perfusion AB stock, see the SE:XVIVO Stock Forecast page.

More about Xvivo Perfusion AB

XVIVO Perfusion AB is a Swedish medical technology company focused on extending the life of major organs to enable more successful transplants. Its organ preservation and perfusion solutions are used by transplant teams and researchers globally, and the company is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm under the ticker XVIVO.

Average Trading Volume: 151,164

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: SEK9.37B

See more data about XVIVO stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

An update from SB Financial Group ( (SBFG) ) is now available.

At its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders held on April 22, 2026, in Defiance, Ohio, SB Financial Group, Inc. reported that 74.21% of its 6,302,455 outstanding common shares were represented in person or by proxy. Shareholders elected Timothy L. Claxton, Gaylyn J. Finn, and Sue A. Strausbaugh to three-year board terms expiring in 2029, reinforcing the company’s existing governance structure.

Investors also approved the ratification of FORVIS, LLP as the independent registered public accounting firm for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2026, signaling support for SB Financial’s audit oversight. In addition, a majority backed a non-binding advisory resolution approving the compensation of the company’s named executive officers, indicating broad shareholder alignment with current executive pay practices and overall management direction.

data.title: XVIVO’s U.S. PRESERVE Trial Shows Strong One-Year Outcomes for Heart Preservation Technology
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Xvivo Perfusion AB ( (SE:XVIVO) ) is now available.

XVIVO Perfusion AB reported preliminary one-year follow-up data from the U.S. PRESERVE trial evaluating its hypothermic oxygenated perfusion heart technology, Heart Assist Transport, in extended criteria donor and donation after circulatory death hearts. The study enrolled 141 transplant recipients across 14 U.S. centers and met its pre-specified primary endpoints, with a 92.1% overall success rate at 30 days, 91.4% patient survival at one year, and a 7.9% incidence of severe primary graft dysfunction at 24 hours.

The median out-of-body time for donor hearts was 291 minutes and nearly three-quarters of hearts were preserved for more than four hours, underscoring the system’s potential to mitigate ischemic time constraints compared with standard static cold storage. XVIVO’s management framed the results as an important step in advancing organ preservation and broadening the use of higher-risk donor hearts, and said the company plans to submit the PRESERVE data to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration for review later this year, a move that could be pivotal for its U.S. market ambitions if the investigational device ultimately gains approval.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:XVIVO) stock is a Buy with a SEK225.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Xvivo Perfusion AB stock, see the SE:XVIVO Stock Forecast page.

More about Xvivo Perfusion AB

XVIVO Perfusion AB is a Swedish medical technology company focused on organ preservation solutions that extend the life of all major organs for transplantation. Founded in 1998 and listed on Nasdaq Stockholm under the ticker XVIVO, the company supports transplant teams globally through specialized technologies and research aimed at expanding the pool of viable donor organs and improving transplant outcomes.

Average Trading Volume: 151,164

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: SEK9.37B

data.title: Unidata Corrects Governance Filings Ahead of Board of Statutory Auditors Appointment
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Unidata S.P.A. ( (IT:UD) ) has shared an update.

Unidata S.p.A., an Italian telecommunications, cloud and IoT operator founded in 1985, operates an 8,500 km fiber network, wireless infrastructure and a proprietary data center to deliver ultra-broadband FTTH connectivity, VoIP, cloud services and custom solutions to over 31,000 customers. The company is also active in Internet of Things applications for home automation and smart cities, and its shares trade on the Euronext Milan – STAR Segment of Borsa Italiana.

The company has reissued its remuneration report and the shareholder Uninvest S.r.l.’s list for appointing the Board of Statutory Auditors after correcting previously incomplete or non-viewable information. By updating these governance documents and making them publicly available through its registered office, an authorized storage mechanism and its website, Unidata seeks to ensure regulatory compliance and transparency for shareholders ahead of corporate decision-making on executive pay and board oversight composition.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:UD) stock is a Buy with a EUR4.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Unidata S.P.A. stock, see the IT:UD Stock Forecast page.

More about Unidata S.P.A.

Unidata S.p.A. is an Italian telecommunications, cloud and IoT operator founded in 1985 and still led by its original three partners. Leveraging an 8,500 km and growing fiber network, a wireless network and a proprietary data center, it serves more than 31,000 business, wholesale and residential customers with ultra-broadband FTTH connectivity, VoIP, cloud and tailored solutions, and develops IoT offerings for home automation and smart city applications.

The company, listed on the Euronext Milan – STAR Segment of Borsa Italiana under ISIN IT0005573065, positions itself as a high-reliability infrastructure player in Italy’s digital transformation landscape. Its integrated telecoms and cloud platform underpins its competitive stance in both traditional connectivity and emerging IoT-driven services.

On April 21, 2026, Art’s-Way Manufacturing Co., Inc. held its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders, where shareholders elected five directors to the board and ratified the appointment of Eide Bailly LLP as independent auditor for the fiscal year ending November 30, 2026. Investors also approved an increase of 500,000 shares under the 2020 Equity Incentive Plan and endorsed, on an advisory basis, the compensation of the company’s named executive officers, signaling continued shareholder support for current governance, incentive structures, and leadership direction.

These actions strengthen Art’s-Way’s governance framework by confirming board composition and auditor oversight, while the expanded equity pool enhances the company’s ability to attract and retain key talent in a competitive agricultural equipment market. The advisory approval of executive pay indicates general shareholder alignment with management’s strategic approach, potentially supporting stability in the company’s operations and long-term planning.
